_README: Colony Doctrines — major strategic identities. Each doctrine reshapes economy, threat, critter behavior, and map planning. Modifiers are queried via Doctrines.getMod(key) and stack with research/passives. Pick one per run, permanent until respec unlocked.

risk.label: short risk label
risk.mechanic: id of special system to activate (pollution, instability, building_fragility, threat_multiplier)

node_id.name: display name
node_id.crossBranch: if hybrid, id of other doctrine whose tier-2+ must be owned

industrial_tyrant.name: Industrial Tyrant
industrial_tyrant.description: Your colony is a grinding machine. Production reigns, pollution be damned.

risk.label: Industrial Pollution
risk.desc: Heavy buildings emit pollution zones. Pollution damages critters, saps morale, and slowly fatigues building HP. Buildings also have a small breakdown chance per tick.

overdrive.name: Overdrive
overdrive.desc: Buildings auto-overclock: +50% output and emit +1 pollution tile. Overclocked buildings take +10% HP drain per minute.

auto_smelter.name: Auto-Smelter Efficiency
auto_smelter.desc: Smelters, refineries, and gas refineries run 50% faster and use 25% less input resources.

reinforced_machinery.name: Reinforced Machinery
reinforced_machinery.desc: +25% building HP. -30% breakdown chance. Pollution damage to buildings reduced 50%.

tyrant_grid.name: Tyrant Grid (Capstone)
tyrant_grid.desc: [STUB] Place a Grid Pylon that boosts all buildings within 10 tiles and neutralizes their pollution. Behavior not yet implemented.

eco_factory.name: Eco-Factory (Nature Hybrid)
eco_factory.desc: Pollution zones also grant +20% food production at farms/greenhouses inside them.

magitek_forges.name: Magitek Forges (Arcane Hybrid)
magitek_forges.desc: Smelters 20% chance to yield bonus rare resources. Industrial buildings absorb minor anomalies.

enemyKillInPollution.desc: Enemies killed inside pollution zones drop bonus iron scrap.

natures_harmony.name: Nature's Harmony
natures_harmony.description: Your critters are family. Buildings serve them, not the other way around.

core.label: Living Colony
core.desc: +15% critter HP, +10% critter work/combat effectiveness, +25% morale recovery.

risk.label: Fragile Structures
risk.desc: Without industrial engineering, all buildings have -20% max HP.

symbiosis.name: Symbiotic Growth
symbiosis.desc: Grass-type critters passively generate +0.1 food/sec each, regardless of assignment.

wild_bond.name: Wild Bond
wild_bond.desc: +30% capture rate. Patrol critters heal 1 HP/sec when out of combat.

living_walls.name: Living Walls
living_walls.desc: Walls regenerate 2 HP/sec. Trees near colony act as natural barriers enemies must break.

overgrowth.name: Overgrowth (Capstone)
overgrowth.desc: Colony tiles slowly spawn resource nodes (wood/food) over time. Critters gain a 'Bonded' buff that scales with colony size.

sustainable_harvest.name: Sustainable Harvest (Industrial Hybrid)
sustainable_harvest.desc: Industrial buildings don't reduce critter morale. Lumber mills and mines don't deplete nearby tiles.

druidic_rites.name: Druidic Rites (Arcane Hybrid)
druidic_rites.desc: Rare chance for captured critters to come pre-rolled with a legendary passive. Anomaly events heal instead of harm.

arcane_dominion.name: Arcane Dominion
arcane_dominion.description: You tap into chaos itself. Research bends reality — but reality bends back.

risk.label: Arcane Instability
risk.desc: Periodic arcane instability events strike active colony structures. Can be good, bad, or extremely strange.

passive_amplifier.name: Passive Amplifier Towers
passive_amplifier.desc: Unlock Amplifier Towers. Critter passives within 8 tiles of a tower trigger 30% stronger.

temporal_surge.name: Temporal Surges
temporal_surge.desc: Active ability: 2x speed burst for all nearby work/combat for 8 seconds (60s cooldown).

unstable_magic.name: Unstable Magic
unstable_magic.desc: Instability events double in frequency but 60% are beneficial: resource duplication, critter teleports, weather buffs.

reality_rift.name: Reality Rift (Capstone)
reality_rift.desc: Open permanent rifts on the map. Rifts spawn anomaly resources, corrupt nearby enemies into allies, and occasionally vomit legendary critters.

enchanted_forges.name: Enchanted Forges (Industrial Hybrid)
enchanted_forges.desc: Your smelters also produce Aethershards at 1/10th the crystal rate. Industrial buildings within Amplifier range are immune to instability.

fey_pact.name: Fey Pact (Nature Hybrid)
fey_pact.desc: Captured critters have 25% chance to gain an additional random passive. Anomaly events can spawn a wild fairy critter.

warlords_path.name: Warlord's Path
warlords_path.description: You declare war on the world. The world declares war right back — and you're ready.

core.label: Warcry
core.desc: +20% combat damage (player, patrols, turrets). +15% patrol/turret attack speed.

risk.label: Blood Beacon
risk.desc: +50% threat generated from violence and colony presence. Enemies spawn in bigger, more coordinated waves.

blood_tithe.name: Blood Tithe
blood_tithe.desc: Each enemy/wild critter killed grants 2 wood, 1 iron, and 1 food. Scales with enemy level.

war_machines.name: War Machines
war_machines.desc: Turrets gain +50% fire rate, +2 tile range, and pierce 1 additional target.

conscription.name: Conscription
conscription.desc: During hordes, any aggressive wild critters within 15 tiles of colony are temporarily recruited to fight for you.

siege_engine.name: Siege Engine (Capstone)
siege_engine.desc: Build a mobile Siege Engine you can ride. High damage, high HP, crushes buildings and critters.

war_factory.name: War Factory (Industrial Hybrid)
war_factory.desc: Turrets can be overclocked for 3x fire rate at the cost of HP. Ammo crafting 40% faster.

battle_mage.name: Battle Mage (Arcane Hybrid)
battle_mage.desc: Patrol critters deal +20% damage as arcane (ignores armor). Horde deaths charge a 'Wrath' meter for free Temporal Surges.
